case_title: LAWRENCE, ROBERT VS CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO C/O DENNIS HERRERA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY LAWRENCE, ROBERT AS TO DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO  C/O DENNIS HERRERA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-21-2004 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO  C/O DENNIS HERRERA
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-21-2004, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO AUG-04-2004 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
MEMORANDUM OF INFORMAL BRIEF FILED BY SONNY KOYA, REPRESENTATIVE OF DEFT.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-04-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO AUG-25-2004 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 FOR FURTHER TRIAL.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAWRENCE, ROBERT IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO  C/O DENNIS HERRERA DEFENDANT EXHIBT C, COURT REPORTER TRANSCRIPT OF SENTENCING PROCEEDINGS DATED OCT. 15, 1997 FILED ON DEC. 22, 1997 PAGES 6-10. CLAIM ALSO BARRED BY STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
